76333157.title: Catch Me a Killer (TV series)

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: 2024 South African true crime TV series

76333157.description: 2024 South African true crime TV series
76333157.extract: Catch Me a Killer is a 2024 11-part true crime television series set in South Africa, based on cases worked on by forensic psychologist and police investigator Micki Pistorius in the 1990s. It stars British actress Charlotte Hope as Pistorius.
